title: Buying Snacks 买零食
scene: 放学后两个同学去小卖部买零食。

lines.en: Ben, I'm so hungry! Let's go to the snack shop.
lines.zh: 本，我好饿！我们去小卖部吧。

lines.en: Good idea! I have some pocket money today.
lines.zh: 好主意！我今天有零花钱。

lines.en: Hello! Do you have any chocolate bars?
lines.zh: 你好！你们有巧克力棒吗？

lines.en: Yes, we have milk chocolate and dark chocolate.
lines.zh: 有的，有牛奶巧克力和黑巧克力。

lines.en: I want a bag of potato chips, please.
We have BBQ flavor and sour cream flavor.
lines.zh: 我们有烧烤味和酸奶油味的。

lines.en: BBQ flavor, please! And a bottle of cola.
lines.zh: 请给我烧烤味的！还有一瓶可乐。

lines.en: I'll take two chocolate bars and a pack of cookies.
lines.zh: 我要两根巧克力棒和一包饼干。

lines.en: Let's split it. You pay twelve and I'll pay eleven. Deal?
lines.zh: 我们平分吧。你付十二，我付十一。说定了？
